articles.title: Girl, 16, saved from alleged kidnapper after mouthing 'help' to petrol station worker
articles.description: A 16-year-old girl was rescued from her alleged kidnapper in Hamtramck, Michigan, after silently mouthing the word 'help' to a quick-thinking petrol station worker, who ushered her to safety before police arrived and arrested the suspect.

articles.title: Kelowna long-term care worker convicted of sexual assault amid B.C. wildfire evacuations
articles.description: A judge has found an unnamed health-care worker at a long-term care facility in the Central Okanagan guilty of three counts of sexual assault against his co-workers. The assaults happened while the workers were staying in the Lower Mainland in order to care for evacuated residents during the August 2023 McDougall Creek wildfire in West Kelowna.

articles.title: Israeli army investigates soldier seen striking Jesus statue in Lebanon
articles.description: IDF says sledgehammer photo circulating online is authentic and is being viewed with ‘great severity’ The Israeli army has said it is investigating a soldier who was seen apparently striking a statue of Jesus with a sledgehammer in southern Lebanon. The Israel Defense Forces said they had determined that an image circulating on social media showing the incident was authentic. The image appears to show an Israeli soldier using a sledgehammer to strike the head of a statue of a crucified Jesus that had fallen off a cross. Continue reading...

articles.title: ‘Flogging’ victim, suspect found dead at Manila condominium
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — The victim and the suspect in an alleged “flogging” were found dead at a condominium in Tondo, Manila, the police said. The purported incident was discovered by an unnamed witness around 9 p.m. on Sunday, April 19, the Manila Police District (MPD) reported. “[The witness], while inside her room, heard someone screaming for help. Upon checking, she discovered the victim along the hallway. She and other residents attempted to assist, but they observed the suspect inside [the unit]. Out of fear, they immediately left the area,” the MPD explained. READ: BSP employee found dead inside Manila condo [...]...
